_doc: Whittaker field biomes: domain-warped climate noise â†’ biome lookup â†’ smooth.
Border art is render-time beveled edges (no transition tile speckle).
neighbors: allowed adjacent parent biomes (enforced by smoothing pass).
transitions: border tile palettes keyed 'a:b' (sorted ids).
groundDecor: clutter density + weighted kinds per biome.
subBiomes: micro-regions stamped only inside allowedParents.

biomes._note: Authored-only biome: not produced by the Whittaker classifier, so it appears solely where a WorldSpec region forces it (see world_spec.gd).
biomes.name: Wheatfields
